dealSummary: Supabase, which provides a Postgres development platform, raised a $500 million Series F led by Singapore's sovereign wealth fund GIC at a $10 billion valuation.
AI model developer Flourish secured a $500 million round from investors including Jeff Bezos, GV and Lux Capital at a $2.5 billion valuation, Wired reported.
Physical AI startup Generalist secured a $400 million round led by Radical Ventures.
Allen Control Systems, which develops autonomous precision weapons, received a $200 million Series B led by Smash Capital at a $2.2 billion valuation.

company: Airspeed, developer of an agent-native platform for go-to-market execution
dealSummary: London-based Airspeed, developer of an agent-native platform for go-to-market execution, raised a $20 million Series A led by DN Capital.
Swiss cleantech startup GR3N secured a €15.5 million Series B led by 360 Capital.
